on_enter_level_events.title: Hope River Hospital
on_enter_level_events.message: The fluorescent lights hum overhead. You shouldn't be here... but you have to find answers.

level_police_station: You step out of the hospital and immediately raise your hands. The flashing red and blue lights are blinding.
They cuff you gently, but firmly. As they put you in the back of the cruiser, you look back at the destroyed morgue exit that they completely just glossed over.
You're safe for tonight. But the precinct is just another box, and Death knows exactly where you are.
house: You grip the heavy brass key in your pocket. The sirens are getting closer, but you slip into the shadows before the cruisers pull in.
You navigate the back alleys of {city_name}, keeping your head down until you reach the city limits.
Bludworth's house looms ahead. If anyone knew the rules to this sick game, it was him.
_default: You push through the heavy doors, the fluorescent lights of the hospital fading behind you.
The cool night air is a relief, but the silence feels oppressive. You survived the immediate danger, but the list still burns in your mind.

level_house.name: Bludworth's House
level_house.intro_text: You survived the hospital, but your answers pointed you here. Death isn't done with you yet...

completion_narratives_by_state.impact_floor_break: Your combined weight is too much for the rotted porch! With a sharp crack, the floorboards give way and you stumble into the space beneath. As you look up, dazed, you see the massive wrecking ball swing silently through the space you just occupied... directly into you. The collapsing porch didn't kill you, but it put you right in Death's path. The wrecking ball finishes the job.
completion_narratives_by_state.level_complete_survival:
You stand panting, adrenaline coursing through you, amid the wreckage of Bludworth's back porch.
The crane operator, horrified, quickly secures the crane and drives away before anyone can ask questions.

You're alive... and you have a new destination in mind.
completion_narratives_by_state.obliterated_by_first_swing: Your hesitation was fatal. The world dissolves into a symphony of crushing force and blinding pain. Obliterated by the initial swing of the wrecking ball.
completion_narratives_by_state.impact_return_swing_death: The return swing was faster, more brutal. You couldn't react in time. You cheated death for a second, but it always comes back around. The returning wrecking ball obliterates you.
completion_narratives_by_state.death_by_falling_debris: After all that, it wasn't the ball that got you. A jagged piece of the house's own facade, shaken loose by the chaos, plummets down and ends your story with an abrupt, brutal impact. Killed by falling debris after surviving the wrecking ball.
completion_narratives_by_state.death_by_falling_ball: The massive wrecking ball plummets from the broken crane, crushing you beneath its tremendous weight. So close to escape, yet Death found a way. Crushed by a falling wrecking ball after the crane cable snapped.

on_enter_level_events.title: In Custody
on_enter_level_events.message: The fluorescent lights of the precinct buzz overhead. You are safe from Death in here... but you are trapped.

on_enter_level_events.title: The Fairgrounds
on_enter_level_events.message: The smell of fried food and livestock fills the air. You need to find who you're looking for before the rides become weapons.

on_enter_level_events.title: The Daily Grind
on_enter_level_events.message: The bitter smell of roasted beans masks the scent of ozone. The hiss of the espresso wands sounds like a countdown. Get them out of here.

on_enter_level_events.title: City Vet Clinic
on_enter_level_events.message: The harsh smell of bleach fails to cover the underlying scent of frightened animals and old copper. The quiet hum of the fluorescent lights feels like a trap waiting to spring.

on_enter_level_events.title: Outpatient Clinic
on_enter_level_events.message: Sterile and quiet. But Death doesn't make an appointment.

on_enter_level_events.title: The McKineplex
on_enter_level_events.message: The neon lights buzz overhead like angry hornets. The smell of stale popcorn and ozone hangs in the air. Death has front row seats.

on_enter_level_events.title: Strike & Spare
on_enter_level_events.message: The thunderous crash of bowling pins echoes like distant artillery. The air is thick with the smell of floor wax and stale beer. Keep your eyes open.

on_enter_level_events.title: McKinley Galleria
on_enter_level_events.message: Muzak echoes hollowly through the cavernous shopping center. The glass ceiling above looks fragile, and the escalators grind with a sinister mechanical hum.

on_enter_level_events.title: Community Center
on_enter_level_events.message: The heavy scent of chlorine burns your nose. The echoing thuds of basketballs and splashing water mask the sound of failing machinery. You need to hurry.

on_enter_level_events.title: Food Truck Plaza
on_enter_level_events.message: Generators humming, propane tanks baking in the sun, and boiling grease. What could go wrong?

on_enter_level_events.title: Construction Site
on_enter_level_events.message: The air is thick with concrete dust. The groaning of stressed steel and the roar of heavy machinery make it hard to think. One wrong step here is a long way down.

on_enter_level_events.title: Shipping Warehouse
on_enter_level_events.message: Towering racks of heavy crates lean precariously over the concrete floor. Forklifts dart blindly around corners.

on_enter_level_events.title: Office Building
on_enter_level_events.message: Rows of cubicles and floor-to-ceiling glass windows. There are entirely too many ways to fall in a place like this.

on_enter_level_events.title: Grand Central Hotel
on_enter_level_events.message: A sprawling historic hotel with ancient wiring, heavy chandeliers, and a boiler room that hasn't been inspected in a decade.

on_enter_level_events.title: Italian Bistro
on_enter_level_events.message: The clatter of dishes and the roar of industrial gas stoves from the kitchen leak into the dining area.

on_enter_level_events.title: McKinley Point
on_enter_level_events.message: The roar of the ocean is deafening. Salt spray stings your eyes. The skeletal remains of the lighthouse groan in the gale-force winds. The entire structure feels like it's waiting for an excuse to fall into the sea.

on_enter_level_events.title: The Old Mill
on_enter_level_events.message: Rotted floorboards, exposed rusted gears, and rushing water. This entire structure is a safety violation waiting to happen.

on_enter_level_events.title: Pier 9
on_enter_level_events.message: Heavy shipping containers sway on rusty crane cables overhead. The dark water slaps against the barnacle-covered pylons below.

on_enter_level_events.title: Presage Paper
on_enter_level_events.message: The relentless, deafening rhythmic thud of the massive pulp presses vibrates through the soles of your shoes. There are a million ways to die in a place like this.

on_enter_level_events.title: The End of the Line
on_enter_level_events.message: You have gathered what you need. It is time to make your play against Death.
